name: generate-structure
description: Generate STRUCTURE_AUTO.md file by extracting all exported functions and components from the codebase. Run this when you need to check for duplicates or verify the current code structure.
when_to_use: Before adding new components to check for existing similar components
After refactoring to verify structure changes
To compare against STRUCTURE.md for completeness
follow_up_actions: Read STRUCTURE_AUTO.md to see current exports
